parameters.sqlQuery:
-- CPL Analysis: mandatory CTE join pattern
-- Leads source: hubspot_leads_module_daily ONLY (never hubspot_leads_daily = legacy)
-- Spend source: campaigns_daily (always USD, never SAR)
-- Pre-aggregate HubSpot before joining to avoid spend fan-out (direct join multiplies spend)
-- CPL zones (USD): scale <$25 | acceptable $25-$38 | warning $40-$49 | pause >$50
-- CPQL zones (USD): scale <$85 | acceptable $80-$95 | warning $95-$130 | pause >$160
-- Entry gate: CPL > $38 USD. Pause: CPL > $50 USD. Scale: CPL < $25 USD.
-- LinkedIn: campaign GROUP = utm_campaign | Ad Set = utm_audience | Ad = utm_content
-- Awareness gate (WebsiteTraffic/ImpressionShare/Reach): skip CPL/CPQL checks entirely
-- 14-day gate: confirm >=14 days data before any pause/scale/budget action
WITH hs AS (
  SELECT date, LOWER(lead_utm_campaign) AS campaign_key,
         SUM(leads_total) AS leads_total,
         SUM(leads_qualified) AS leads_qualified
  FROM `{{ $vars.BQ_PROJECT }}.{{ $vars.BQ_DATASET }}.hubspot_leads_module_daily`
  WHERE date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'), INTERVAL 30 DAY)
  GROUP BY date, LOWER(lead_utm_campaign)
)
SELECT c.channel, c.campaign_name, c.campaign_id,
       SUM(c.spend) AS spend,
       SUM(hs.leads_total) AS leads_total,
       SUM(hs.leads_qualified) AS leads_qualified,
       ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(SUM(c.spend), SUM(hs.leads_total)), 2) AS cpl,
       ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(SUM(c.spend), SUM(hs.leads_qualified)), 2) AS cpql,
       ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(SUM(hs.leads_qualified), NULLIF(SUM(hs.leads_total),0))*100, 1) AS qual_pct
FROM `{{ $vars.BQ_PROJECT }}.{{ $vars.BQ_DATASET }}.campaigns_daily` c
LEFT JOIN hs ON c.date = hs.date
           AND LOWER(c.campaign_name) = hs.campaign_key
WHERE c.date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'), INTERVAL 30 DAY)
  AND c.channel = '={{$input.first().json.channel}}'
  AND c.spend > 0
  AND LOWER(c.campaign_name) NOT IN (
    SELECT LOWER(campaign_name)
    FROM `{{ $vars.BQ_PROJECT }}.{{ $vars.BQ_DATASET }}.campaigns_daily`
    WHERE date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'), INTERVAL 2 DAY)
    GROUP BY campaign_name
    HAVING SUM(spend) = 0 AND SUM(impressions) = 0
  )
GROUP BY c.channel, c.campaign_name, c.campaign_id
HAVING SUM(c.spend) > 0
ORDER BY cpl DESC
LIMIT 20

parameters.jsCode:
const rows=$input.all().map(i=>i.json);
const ch=$('Trigger').first().json.channel, cpl=$('Trigger').first().json.cpl;
// CPL entry gate: CPL > $38 USD (top of acceptable range). Was wrongly "$20 SAR".
// Filter for rows above acceptable range ($38) for analysis focus
const worst=rows.filter(r=>(r.cpl||0)>38).slice(0,8);
return [{json:{
  system:`You are a paid media analyst for Qoyod (a SaaS company in Saudi Arabia).

CRITICAL KPI RULES:
- CPL zones (USD): scale <$25 | acceptable $25-$38 | warning $40-$49 | pause >$50
- CPQL zones (USD): scale <$85 | acceptable $80-$95 | warning $95-$130 | pause >$160
- CPL entry gate: CPL > $38 USD triggers analysis. Pause threshold: CPL > $50 USD.
- CPL = SUM(campaigns_daily.spend) / SUM(hubspot_leads_module_daily.leads_total) via CTE join
- NEVER use channel-reported lead counts. Always use HubSpot lead module data.
- Spend is always USD. Deal amounts in BQ are already USD. NEVER divide by 3.75.
- Awareness campaigns (WebsiteTraffic / ImpressionShare / Reach): skip CPL/CPQL checks entirely.
- 14-day minimum window before any pause/scale/budget action.

LINKEDIN SPECIAL RULE:
- LinkedIn campaign level: join on utm_campaign (= Campaign Group in LinkedIn UI)
- LinkedIn ad set level: join on utm_audience (= Campaign in LinkedIn UI)
- LinkedIn ad level: join on utm_content (= Ad in LinkedIn UI)


KEYWORD PAUSE RULES (QS-based, not CPL-based):
- Pause if: QS < 5 AND >80% lost impression share
- Converting keyword exception: if QS < 5 AND conv > 4 AND $10 <= CPA <= $70 -> LEAVE ENABLED (keyword is converting despite low QS)
- Minimum 10-day keyword age before any pause - keywords younger than 10 days: add to monitoring list, no action
- Zero-active-keyword guard: NEVER pause the last enabled keyword in an ad group (would kill campaign silently)
- NEVER delete a keyword - only pause
- QS = 0 (PMax keywords or not-yet-set): skip, cannot evaluate
APPROVAL RULE:
- ALL actions (pause, scale, bid change, budget shift) must queue to #approvals channel
- Execution only after emoji reaction from approver
- Exception: bid increases <=10% auto-execute

CRO HANDOFF CHAIN (when CPL issue traced to LP/quality):
CRO Specialist -> UI/UX Designer -> Developer -> pixel verification in Events Manager
(both Meta pixels observed + UTM passthrough confirmed) -> LP sign-off

Analyze CPL data for ${ch}. Current channel CPL: $${cpl} USD.
Find root cause and recommend fixes. Do NOT recommend pausing without checking 14-day window.
Output JSON: {"root_cause":str,"worst_campaigns":[{"campaign_name":str,"cpl":num,"cpql":num,"recommendation":str}],"channel_recommendation":str,"asana_title":str,"requires_cro_handoff":bool}`,
  messages:[{role:'user',content:`Channel: ${ch}\nCurrent CPL: $${cpl} USD\n\nCampaign breakdown (CPL > $38 USD):\n${JSON.stringify(worst,null,2)}`}]
}}];

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ data: { name: $json.task_name, notes: $json.task_notes, projects: ['1214135581886045'], assignee: '1208007704598388', due_on: $json.due_on } }) }}

parameters.sqlQuery:
-- CPL Analysis: mandatory CTE join pattern
-- Leads source: hubspot_leads_module_daily ONLY (never hubspot_leads_daily = legacy)
-- Spend source: campaigns_daily (always USD, never SAR)
-- Pre-aggregate HubSpot before joining to avoid spend fan-out (direct join multiplies spend)
-- CPL zones (USD): scale <$25 | acceptable $25-$38 | warning $40-$49 | pause >$50
-- CPQL zones (USD): scale <$85 | acceptable $80-$95 | warning $95-$130 | pause >$160
-- Entry gate: CPL > $38 USD. Pause: CPL > $50 USD. Scale: CPL < $25 USD.
-- LinkedIn: campaign GROUP = utm_campaign | Ad Set = utm_audience | Ad = utm_content
-- Awareness gate (WebsiteTraffic/ImpressionShare/Reach): skip CPL/CPQL checks entirely
-- 14-day gate: confirm >=14 days data before any pause/scale/budget action
WITH hs AS (
  SELECT date, LOWER(lead_utm_campaign) AS campaign_key,
         SUM(leads_total) AS leads_total,
         SUM(leads_qualified) AS leads_qualified
  FROM `{{ $vars.BQ_PROJECT }}.{{ $vars.BQ_DATASET }}.hubspot_leads_module_daily`
  WHERE date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'), INTERVAL 30 DAY)
  GROUP BY date, LOWER(lead_utm_campaign)
)
SELECT c.channel, c.campaign_name, c.campaign_id,
       SUM(c.spend) AS spend,
       SUM(hs.leads_total) AS leads_total,
       SUM(hs.leads_qualified) AS leads_qualified,
       ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(SUM(c.spend), SUM(hs.leads_total)), 2) AS cpl,
       ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(SUM(c.spend), SUM(hs.leads_qualified)), 2) AS cpql,
       ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(SUM(hs.leads_qualified), NULLIF(SUM(hs.leads_total),0))*100, 1) AS qual_pct
FROM `{{ $vars.BQ_PROJECT }}.{{ $vars.BQ_DATASET }}.campaigns_daily` c
LEFT JOIN hs ON c.date = hs.date
           AND LOWER(c.campaign_name) = hs.campaign_key
WHERE c.date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'), INTERVAL 30 DAY)
  AND c.channel = '={{$input.first().json.channel}}'
  AND c.spend > 0
  AND LOWER(c.campaign_name) NOT IN (
    SELECT LOWER(campaign_name)
    FROM `{{ $vars.BQ_PROJECT }}.{{ $vars.BQ_DATASET }}.campaigns_daily`
    WHERE date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'), INTERVAL 2 DAY)
    GROUP BY campaign_name
    HAVING SUM(spend) = 0 AND SUM(impressions) = 0
  )
GROUP BY c.channel, c.campaign_name, c.campaign_id
HAVING SUM(c.spend) > 0
ORDER BY cpl DESC
LIMIT 20
